title: 夏に華咲け！天下のウマ娘！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The students of Tracen Academy are helping set
up this year's summer festival. I decide to drop by
to see how they're doing.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ain't nothin' like the sound of drums and flutes to
make an Edo gal's blood run wild!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Turbo, Kitasan! How are things goin' over there?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
All good! The stage is ready for the festival
dance!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Same here! The sound and lighting are working
just fine!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Got it! Good work, you two! Guess that means
things are finally wrappin' up.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Turbo, go grab me the compensation I promised
ya.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: The food stall vouchers?! You were serious?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You gotta use whatcha earn. Go wild with those
and have a good—

text_block_list.name: Festival Staff
text_block_list.text:
Huh, your back is out?! So you can't make it
anymore?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? Did someone get hurt?

text_block_list.name: Festival Staff
text_block_list.text:
The singer we planned for the festival dance can't
make it tonight...

text_block_list.name: Festival Staff
text_block_list.text:
What should we do about the song? We'll have to
go without vocals...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Aww... But we put a mic out and everything.
Bummer...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
No need to fret. Aren't you forgettin' who you're
talkin' to?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sure, there'll be a few disappointed faces 'cause
they can't see the ol' singer they were expectin'.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But you're lookin' at a group of Umamusume from
the mighty Tracen Academy here!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Rehearsed or not, it would damage our rep if we
didn't step in to help!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: That's right! We can't let the public down!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm confident in my singing! You can count on me!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoooaa!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: This is so cooool! I wanna say something cool too!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Isn't yellin' big boasts your specialty?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Um... Turbo engines booooost! Let's really rev up
the crowd!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You said it! Now come on! Let's give 'em a show
to remember!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, come closer! Don't just stand and
watch, you gotta dance!

text_block_list.name: Festival Goer
text_block_list.text: What's going on?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: C'mon, boys and girls! Don't be shy!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
This isn't your customary dance! We're turnin' up
the heat this year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pleasant music and energetic cheers fill the air
around the stage. Their efforts make this summer
night a lively one.
